conj2k5.name: Prove A₁ for k=5
conj2k5.description: Prove A₁^(5) = -k·c_k/48 - (k+1)(k+3)/(8·c_k). Currently verified to 12 digits. Kloosterman bound C_5 ≤ 1.36, conductor N_5 = 24. Path: explicit Kloosterman analysis at conductor 24.

conj3k2.name: Prove A₂ for k=2
conj3k2.description: Prove A₂^(2) = (k+3)(π²k² - 9k - 9)/(96kπ²). Currently verified to 11 digits. Needs M=2 saddle-point expansion (Lemma W).

conj3k3.name: Prove A₂ for k=3
conj3k3.description: Prove A₂^(3) = (k+3)(π²k² - 9k - 9)/(96kπ²). Currently verified to 11 digits. Needs M=2 saddle-point expansion (Lemma W).

conj3k4.name: Prove A₂ for k=4
conj3k4.description: Prove A₂^(4) = (k+3)(π²k² - 9k - 9)/(96kπ²). Currently verified to 11 digits. Needs M=2 saddle-point expansion (Lemma W).

conj3k5.name: Prove A₂ for k=5
conj3k5.description: Prove A₂^(5) = (k+3)(π²k² - 9k - 9)/(96kπ²). Currently verified to 11 digits. Needs M=2 saddle-point expansion (Lemma W).

lemma_w.name: Prove Lemma W (Wright M=2 saddle control)
lemma_w.description: Extend Lemma PP to M=2 for plane partitions. Need Olver uniform bounds at second order. Unlocks Conjecture 3* proofs AND plane partition A₁.

sixth_root.name: Sixth-root regime (α=5, d=5/6) numerical verification
sixth_root.description: Compute prod_{n≥1}(1-q^n)^{-n^4} to N=5000. Predict L₅ = (c₅·5/6)^6/720 + κ₅. First UNTESTED regime — confirmation would extend the pattern to 5 growth classes.

seventh_root.name: Seventh-root regime (α=6, d=6/7) numerical verification
seventh_root.description: Compute prod_{n≥1}(1-q^n)^{-n^5} to N=3000. Test general L_d formula at p=7.

andrews_gordon.name: Andrews-Gordon partitions ratio universality
andrews_gordon.description: Test ratio universality for Andrews-Gordon partition families. These satisfy Meinardus conditions with different D(s). Compute first 5000 terms and extract L, A₁.

overpartition_A1.name: Overpartition A₁ closed form proof
overpartition_A1.description: A₁^(over) ≈ -0.7133 derived but level-2 Kloosterman on Γ₀(2) needed. Compute Kloosterman sums for eta-quotients on Γ₀(2) at q ≤ 300.

pp_A1.name: Plane partition A₁ closed form
pp_A1.description: A₁^(pp) ≈ -0.25. Requires Lemma W + Wright saddle at M=1. Cube-root convergence makes numerical extraction harder.

bdj_bridge.name: BDJ bridge — ratio fluctuations → Tracy-Widom
bdj_bridge.description: Test whether partition ratio fluctuations ξ_m under Plancherel measure converge to Tracy-Widom. Existing: 10k samples at n=1000, mean(χ)=-1.608, std=0.830 (TW₂=0.813). Extend to n=5000-10000, 100k samples, compute KS statistic vs TW₂.

phase_boundary.name: Phase transition boundary in Dirichlet parameter space
phase_boundary.description: Find where universality breaks. Scan Meinardus products with D(s) = sum a_k/k^s for various coefficient patterns. Harris-criterion analogy: locate critical boundary.

kloosterman_q500.name: Extend Kloosterman bounds to q ≤ 500
kloosterman_q500.description: Current bounds use q ≤ 300 (472s runtime). Extending to q ≤ 500 tightens C_k bounds, may push some below proof threshold. Particularly C_5 ≤ 1.36 → may drop below 1.0.

A3_numerical.name: Extract A₃ (fifth-order) numerically for k=1..5
A3_numerical.description: Not yet attempted. Needs N ≥ 15000 for k=1, Richardson extrapolation at order 5. Would open path to Conjecture 4*.

delta_k_qmf.name: Δ_k quantum modular form interpretation
delta_k_qmf.description: Δ_k·c_k = -(k+3)(k-1)/8 is exactly rational. Test whether this arises from Zagier quantum modular forms. Compute mock modular partners of η(τ)^{-k}.

ecal_log.outcome: α^(5) ≈ -0.265784925724 via Lagrange-4pt, 8.3 digits | A₁ ≈ -1.643546, 8.8 digits
α^(6) ≈ -0.096100857955 via Lagrange-4pt, 8.0 digits | A₁ ≈ -2.038743, 9.0 digits
